meta_description: Mentor for scholarships, study-abroad programs, careers, and mobility for the Mentee community.
landing_title: Scholarships, study-abroad, careers, and mobility in one chat.
landing_subtitle: Sign in with your Mentee account to ask about funded programs, learning paths, and international mobility. Every program comes with a link to the official source.
login_redirect_warning: Please don't reload or go back while we finish.
landing_feature_scholarships_desc: Find scholarships, grants, and fellowships that match your field, country, and stage, with deadlines and the official application page.
landing_feature_study_abroad_desc: Compare programs, costs, and admissions requirements, including standardized tests like IELTS, TOEFL, or GRE when they apply.
landing_feature_career_desc: Sketch a learning path to a target role, with concrete next skills and free or paid courses to get there.
landing_feature_visa_desc: Understand study and work permits and post-study work routes. I cite official immigration sources, not legal advice.
landing_expect_sources_desc: Every program, deadline, and immigration rule includes a link to the official site. If I can't verify it, I'll say so.
landing_expect_scope_desc: I won't write your essays for you, give legal or medical advice, or decide what's right for your life. I'll help you think clearly and act.
landing_expect_access_desc: Available in English and Spanish to anyone signed in with a Mentee account. No paywall, no upsell.
landing_about_body: MENTEE is a global community supporting women, displaced people, and members navigating systemic barriers to education and careers. This bot is one of the tools the community offers its members. Learn more at
chat_delete_thread_body: "{title}" will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
chat_rename_thread_body: Pick a title that will help you find this chat later.
chat_welcome_title: What can I help you with?
chat_welcome_subtitle: I'm your mentor for scholarships, study-abroad programs, career growth, and international mobility. Pick a starter below or type your own question.
chat_starter_scholarships: Find scholarships that fit my profile
chat_starter_study_abroad: Compare study-abroad options in a country
chat_starter_career: Sketch a learning path toward a target role
chat_starter_visa: Explain student or work mobility pathways
auth_error_denied: Your Mentee account can't access this app. Either you declined to share it, or it isn't enabled for the bot.
auth_error_login_required: You need to be signed in to Mentee first.
auth_error_generic: Something went wrong talking to Mentee. Please try again.
auth_error_unknown: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
notfound_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
admin_users_empty: No users have signed in yet.
admin_thread_empty: This conversation has no messages yet.
admin_activity_search_placeholder: Search conversations by title or owner
admin_user_search_placeholder: Filter users by name or email
admin_delete_thread_body: "{title}" and all its messages will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
admin_force_logout_body: All sessions for {name} will be deleted. They'll be signed out on their next request and will need to log in again. Their Mentee account is untouched.
